description: Use this API routine to return integer quantities of a specified GNE device. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, ival = gneint(name, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the gne device quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Number of terminals used by this model (1 or 2).
Number of the first (or only) bus to which this model is connected.
Number of the second bus to which this model is connected; 0 is returned for a 1 terminal model.
Owner to which the device is assigned.
Number of the non-metered end bus; used for GNE devices with more than one terminal.
Number of floating point data items required by this model.
Number of buses required by the model to calculate its inputs.
Number of number of two-character identifiers required by the model to calculate its inputs.
nth bus number required by this model; n must be between 1 and the number of buses required by the model to calculate its inputs.

error_codes.description: For ‘STRING’ value ‘INTGn’, n is not valid for this model; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
